hyperedges.label: Karpathy Pattern to LLM Wiki Implementation
hyperedges.description: The original Karpathy pattern defines three core operations (Ingest, Query, Lint) and a three-layer architecture. LLM Wiki implements these as a desktop app with enhanced two-step CoT ingest and multi-phase retrieval pipeline.

hyperedges.label: Knowledge Graph Feature Chain
hyperedges.description: The 4-signal relevance model feeds into both Louvain community detection and graph insights. Graph insights can trigger deep research. The relevance model also powers Phase 2 graph expansion in the query retrieval pipeline.

hyperedges.label: Multimodal Image Pipeline Phases
hyperedges.description: The multimodal image spec defines a phased pipeline: Rust extraction -> vision message format -> captioning -> dedup cache. Captions become text chunks flowing into the existing vector search pipeline without schema changes.
